login.title: Sign in
login.failed: Sign-in failed — please check your email and password.

register.title: Register
register.failed: Registration failed — does the account already exist?
register.termsLabel: I accept the Terms and Conditions

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.description: We will send you a link to reset it.
forgot.success: If an account with this email exists, the email is on its way — check your inbox.

reset.title: New password
reset.description: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.invalidLink: This link is invalid — request a new one.
reset.failed: Reset failed — the link may have expired.

auth.networkError: Server unreachable — please try again later.

otp.title: Sign in with code
otp.description: We will send you a 6-digit code — no password needed.
otp.codeDescription: Enter the code we sent to {email}.
otp.requestFailed: Could not request a code — please try again.
otp.invalidCode: The code is wrong or expired — please try again.
otp.phraseHint: Your security phrase (also shown in the email):
otp.switchToOtp: Sign in without password (code via email)
otp.registerDescription: Enter your email, type the code — your account is created automatically.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: The password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.nameMin: The name must be at least 2 characters long
validation.bioMax: The bio must be at most 500 characters long
validation.termsRequired: Please accept the Terms and Conditions

consent.message: We use cookies for anonymous usage statistics. Analytics only loads after your consent.
